revision.comment: Auto generating page. date placed far in the past so it is attributed to Immanuelle and FireflyBot sends them messages if it is ever imported to Wikipedia.
1 revision imported: importing templates from wikipedia
1 revision imported: importing redirects I created with chatGPT
Bot: tag as missing wikidata (no wikidata found via interwikis)

imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was Text replacement - "↵<noinclude>[[Category:Templates without wikidata]]</noinclude>" to ""
Bot: Adding dummy category to make categories work after wiki restoration
Bot: wrap 5 stray tag(s) in noinclude [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/23575804085|commit triggered pipeline]]
revision.text: ==TemplateData== {{TemplateData header}} <templatedata> { "description": "Used when a new row is needed in the table, adds the table code '|-'. It is generally safe to use but is sometime redundant.", "params": { } } </templatedata> <noinclude> [[Category:sn_crud|TESTS-break/TemplateData]] [[Category:sn_crud|TEST-break/TemplateData]] [[Category:sn_crud|TESTS-break/TemplateData]] [[Category:sn_crud|TEST-break/TemplateData]] [[Category:Templates]] [[Category:Templates fixed with noinclude]] </noinclude>

revision.comment: Bot: remove [[Category:Sn crud]] (crud category cleanup) [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/23989927232|commit triggered pipeline]]
